topic: Advanced Passé Composé (Negation, Sequencing & Theory Writing)

subUnits.title: 12.1 Negation in the Past & Time Markers
notes: Negation in the Past & Time Markers
- Example: Je n'ai pas mangé (I did not eat).
- Example: Il n'est pas venu (He did not come).
- In BECE translation questions, you will often see 'I did not go to school yesterday'. You must know to translate this as 'Je ne suis pas allé à l'école hier'.
diagramDescriptions: Formula for negation and list of time markers
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French negation passe compose time markers BECE translation site:youtube.com

quiz.q: Where does 'ne...pas' go in a passé composé sentence?
opts: At the end of the sentence
quiz.explanation: Ne...pas wraps around the auxiliary verb (avoir or être), not the past participle.

quiz.q: How do you write 'She did not come' correctly?
quiz.explanation: Ne becomes n' before a vowel. Elle uses est. Venue has feminine agreement.

quiz.q: How do you write 'We did not finish' correctly?
quiz.explanation: Nous uses avons. Ne does not contract before a consonant.

quiz.q: What does 'hier' mean?
quiz.explanation: Hier means yesterday.

quiz.q: What does 'la semaine dernière' mean?
quiz.explanation: La semaine dernière means last week.

quiz.q: How do you say 'two days ago' in French?
quiz.explanation: Il y a + time period means 'ago'.

quiz.q: What does 'avant-hier' mean?
quiz.explanation: Avant-hier means the day before yesterday.

quiz.q: What does 'l'année dernière' mean?
quiz.explanation: L'année dernière means last year.

quiz.q: How do you write 'I did not have time' correctly?
opts: Je n'ai pas eu le temps
Je n'ai pas avoir le temps
Je ne ai pas eu le temps
Je pas ai eu le temps
quiz.explanation: Je uses ai (n'ai pas). The past participle of avoir is eu.

quiz.q: Which time marker means 'this morning'?
quiz.explanation: Ce matin means this morning.

subUnits.title: 12.2 Sequencing a Story & Dialogues
notes: - D'abord, je suis allé au marché. Ensuite, j'ai acheté des fruits...
- Qu'est-ce que tu as fait le week-end dernier? (What did you do last weekend?)
- Samedi, je suis allé au cinéma...
- Using sequencing words correctly in the BECE essay (Composition) elevates your grammar score and makes your story logical and easy for the examiner to follow.
diagramDescriptions: List of sequencing words and a model dialogue
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French sequencing words d'abord ensuite puis BECE essay writing site:youtube.com

quiz.q: What does 'd'abord' mean?
quiz.explanation: D'abord means first or firstly.

quiz.q: What does 'ensuite' mean?
quiz.explanation: Ensuite means then or next.

quiz.q: What does 'puis' mean?
quiz.explanation: Puis means then or after that.

quiz.q: What does 'enfin' mean?
quiz.explanation: Enfin means finally or at last.

quiz.q: What does 'après' mean?
quiz.explanation: Après means after or afterwards.

quiz.q: What does 'finalement' mean?
quiz.explanation: Finalement means in the end or finally.

quiz.q: Complete: '_______, je me suis réveillé à 7 heures.'
quiz.explanation: Waking up is the first action, so we use D'abord (First).

quiz.q: Complete: 'J'ai mangé le petit-déjeuner. ______, je suis allé à l'école.'
quiz.explanation: Going to school happens after breakfast, so we use Ensuite (Then/Next).

quiz.q: Complete: 'Nous avons joué au football. ______, nous sommes rentrés à la maison.'
quiz.explanation: Going home is the last action, so we use Finalement (Finally).

quiz.q: What question means 'What did you do last weekend?'
opts: Qu'est-ce que tu fais ce week-end?
Qu'est-ce que tu as fait le week-end dernier?
quiz.explanation: Qu'est-ce que tu as fait le week-end dernier? uses the passé composé and the correct time marker.

subUnits.title: 12.3 BECE Theory Writing (Le Week-end Dernier)
notes: - Write a recount of your last weekend (15+ sentences).
- At least 5 AVOIR verbs in the passé composé.
- At least 3 ÊTRE verbs with correct agreement.
- At least 2 time markers (hier, le week-end dernier...).
- At least 3 sequencing words (d'abord, ensuite, puis...).
- Introduction: State when and where (Samedi matin, je suis allé...).
- Body: Sequence your activities using d'abord, ensuite, puis.
- Conclusion: State your feelings or final action (Finalement, j'étais content...)
- The BECE French theory paper always includes a guided composition. Following the checklist exactly guarantees you the maximum score for 'Content' and 'Grammar'.
diagramDescriptions: Essay structure outline and grading checklist
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French BECE theory writing essay structure le week-end dernier site:youtube.com

quiz.q: How many sentences should your BECE weekend recount ideally have?
quiz.explanation: The assessment requires at least 15 sentences to fully demonstrate your grammar skills.

quiz.q: What is a mandatory element to include in the essay?
quiz.explanation: The checklist requires at least 5 AVOIR verbs in the passé composé.

quiz.q: What is another mandatory element?
quiz.explanation: You must include at least 3 ÊTRE verbs with correct gender/number agreement.

quiz.q: How many negative sentences are required?
quiz.explanation: The checklist requires at least 1 negative sentence.

quiz.q: How many time markers should you use?
quiz.explanation: You must use at least 2 time markers to situate the story in the past.

quiz.q: How many sequencing words are required?
quiz.explanation: You must use at least 3 sequencing words to connect your ideas logically.

quiz.q: What tense must the entire essay be written in?
quiz.explanation: Since the topic is 'Le Week-end Dernier', the entire essay must be in the passé composé.

quiz.q: Which of these is a good way to start the essay?
opts: Le week-end dernier, je suis allé au village.
Je mange du riz tous les jours.
quiz.explanation: Le week-end dernier sets the past context, and je suis allé uses the correct passé composé.

quiz.q: What type of text is this essay?
quiz.explanation: Writing about what you did last weekend is a recount or narrative text.

quiz.q: Why is the checklist important?
opts: To ensure you hit all the grading criteria for full marks
quiz.explanation: The checklist aligns with the examiner's grading rubric for Content and Grammar.
